name: blackraptor-marketing
description: BlackRaptor Agents — Marketing Team: a full-stack marketing department of 15 world-class specialist agents plus 9 skills, hub-and-spoke around a shared Marketing Intelligence Core context file. Encodes verified best-practice methodologies (Dillman survey design, Kohavi experimentation, IPA/Binet & Field creative effectiveness, Ehrenberg-Bass distinctive assets, Made to Stick / NN-g writing craft) plus capabilities not found in the open-source ecosystem: trademark/name research, a compliance-gated claims engine, and pricing/willingness-to-pay modeling. Auto-pulls the blackraptor-bridge plugin (evidence-auditor adversarial research gate + research-integrity skill + product-manager). Hard rules baked in: no autonomous sends, posts, or spend — agents draft, humans approve.
